_meta.purpose: Single source for repeated values (prices + next live-event dates) on Stuck Not Broken Circle pages. Pages keep the real value baked into the HTML as a static fallback and only overwrite it from this file if the live fetch succeeds, so nothing ever shows blank and SEO/body copy is unaffected.
_meta.events_note: raw_utc = UTC ISO-8601 (source of truth); display = America/Los_Angeles. Refreshed DAILY from Circle Events (community stucknotbroken, 'Calendar' space id 2429616). next_* = soonest event whose start is in the future at refresh time.
_meta.cohort_rule: Once a cohort has started it is locked: show_publicly=false and its dates are not surfaced on public pages until the next cohort opens.

cohort.name: Self-Regulation Simplified: Cohort 5
cohort.note: Cohort 5 in progress; dates hidden publicly per cohort_rule until the next cohort opens.
